summary: ANDROID | FMD - When app open for first time dialog for 'Data collection' is constantly appearing after clicking on device card
scenario: Data collection dialog reappears repeatedly when tapping device card on FMD screen after denying location permission during onboarding
description_clean: When the app is opened for the first time with a device connected, during onboarding if "Don't Allow" is selected for location, the "Data collection" dialog keeps reappearing after clicking on the device card on the FMD screen. Dismissing the second dialog by clicking outside it and then clicking the device card causes the dialog to pop up constantly instead of showing the device card.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time with a Bluetooth audio device already connected.
2. During the onboarding flow, when prompted for location permission, select "Don't Allow".
3. Complete the onboarding process and land on the Home screen (Find My Device / FMD screen).
4. Tap on the device card displayed on the Home screen.
5. Observe that a "Data collection" dialog appears instead of navigating to the Device Settings screen.
6. Dismiss the "Data collection" dialog by tapping outside of it (on the background).
7. Tap on the device card again.
8. Observe that the "Data collection" dialog reappears repeatedly instead of showing the Device Settings screen.
expected: After dismissing the "Data collection" dialog and tapping the device card again, the app should navigate to the Device Settings screen for the connected device.
actual: The "Data collection" dialog keeps reappearing each time the device card is tapped, preventing access to the Device Settings screen.
